title: IMMUNOCYTOCHEMISTRY PROTOCOL
steps: Select coverslips previously fixed in 4% paraformaldehyde and subsequently washed and stored in PBS solution.
Permeabilize: 0.2% TX-100 in PBS for 00:15:00 at Room temperature .
Mount coverslips to slide with Vectashield antifade mounting medium.
Secondary antibody: mix desired antibody in PBS containing 5% sniper and 0.1% TX-100. Can add DAPI in secondary solution or as a separate step following washing of the secondary.
Primary antibody: mix desired antibody in PBS containing 5% sniper and 0.1% TX-100 overnight at 4 °C (gentle rocking).
Block: 50% Sniper in PBS for 00:15:00 at Room temperature .
creator: Jane Balster
